modules.module_title: Introduction to Poultry Farming & Indian Poultry Industry

questions.question: Poultry farming me main focus kis cheez ke production par hota hai?
questions.explanation: Poultry farming me murgiyon (chickens) ko unke anday (eggs) aur meat ke liye paala jata hai.

questions.question: Layer poultry farming ka main purpose kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Layers un murgiyon ko kehte hain jinhe commercial egg production ke liye paala jata hai.

questions.question: Broiler poultry farming ka main purpose kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Broilers un murgiyon ko kehte hain jinhe fast growth aur meat production ke liye paala jata hai.

questions.question: India me poultry sector ko control aur support karne wali main apex body kaun si hai?

options.A: NABARD and Department of Animal Husbandry

questions.explanation: Department of Animal Husbandry, Dairying & Fisheries and NABARD poultry schemes ko support karte hain.

questions.question: Duniya me egg production ke mamle me India ka rank kya hai lagbhag?
questions.explanation: India egg production me duniya me 3rd rank par aata hai.

questions.question: Poultry business me 'Backyard Poultry' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Ghar ke aangan me chote scale par desi murga paalna

questions.explanation: Backyard poultry rural areas me ghar ke peeche ya aangan me kam kharche me desi murgiyan paalne ko kehte hain.

questions.question: Poultry products me protein ka kya percentage lagbhag hota hai?

options.B: High quality protein (Egg contains ~12-13g protein per 100g)

questions.explanation: Egg protein ko reference protein mana jata hai kyunki isme sabhi essential amino acids balanced hote hain.

questions.question: Poultry farm start karne ke liye capital support (loans) kis bank ke schemes ke under milti hai?

options.A: NABARD (National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development)

questions.explanation: NABARD poultry venture capital fund aur subsidies provide karta hai banks ke through.

questions.question: Poultry farming me 'Day-Old Chick' (DOC) ka kya significance hai?

options.B: Hatchery se nikla 1 din ka chusa
options.C: Ek din me egg dene wali murgi

questions.explanation: Hatchery se seedhe farm par aane wale ek din ke chuse ko DOC (Day-Old Chick) kehte hain.

questions.question: Poultry farm ko set up karne ke liye kis type ki location best maani jati hai?

options.B: Elevated, well-ventilated aur residential area se door

questions.explanation: Disease control aur odor (badbu) se bachne ke liye farm ko aabaadi se door aur unche sthan par banana chahiye.

questions.question: Desi poultry meat (jaise Kadaknath) ka color normal chicken se alag kyu hota hai?

options.A: Kala (Black) color melamin content ki wajah se

questions.explanation: Kadaknath chicken breed ka meat, blood aur body organs black hote hain hyper-pigmentation (melanin) ke karan.

questions.question: Poultry industry me 'Integration' system ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Farmers aapas me milkar kheti karein
options.B: Company chusa, feed, aur dawa deti hai aur farmer rearing charge leta hai
options.D: Poultry aur fish farm ko mix karna

questions.explanation: Integration (jaise Suguna, Venky's) contract farming hai jisme risk kam hota hai aur company feed/chicks supply karti hai.

questions.question: Poultry manure (gobar aur bichona/litter) me kis element ki quantity high hoti hai jo khad ke liye best hai?
questions.explanation: Poultry litter nitrogen aur phosphorus se rich hota hai aur farm crops ke liye ek badhiya organic fertilizer hai.

questions.question: Hatchery aur Commercial Broiler farm ke beech minimum distance kitna hona chahiye disease protection ke liye?

options.D: Dono ek hi room me ho sakte hain

questions.explanation: Biosecurity norms ke hisab se breeding farms aur commercial farms me kafi distance hona chahiye taaki diseases spread na hon.

questions.question: India me poultry meat ka share livestock sector me lagbhag kitna hai?
questions.explanation: India me poultry meat (chicken) sabse zyada consume hone wala meat hai jo pure meat market ka bada hissa hai.

questions.question: Kadaknath poultry breed kis state ki native breed hai?
questions.explanation: Kadaknath MP ke Jhabua aur Dhar districts ki local breed hai jo apne medicinal value aur black meat ke liye jani jati hai.

questions.question: Duniya ki sabse famous egg-laying commercial breed kaun si hai?
questions.explanation: White Leghorn breed pure world me commercial level par sabse zyada anday dene ke liye jani jati hai.

questions.question: Kaun si Indian breed cockfighting (murgon ki ladai) ke liye bahut famous hai?
questions.explanation: Aseel apni pugnacious nature (ladaku pravritti) aur shurvirta ke liye famous hai.

questions.question: Rhode Island Red (RIR) kis type ki breed hai?
questions.explanation: Rhode Island Red ek standard dual-purpose breed hai jo eggs aur meat dono ke liye useful hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon ko cages (pinjro) me rakhne wale system ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Battery cage system me murgiyon ko multi-tiered metal wire cages me rakha jata hai, jisme anday khud roll hokar bahar aa jate hain.

questions.question: Deep Litter system me floor par kis material ki layer bichayi jati hai?

options.B: Rice husk, saw dust, or wood shavings (bhoosa/lakdi ka burada)

questions.explanation: Deep litter system me floor par moisture absorb karne ke liye lakdi ka burada ya chawal ki bhusi (rice husk) 2-3 inch tak bichayi jati hai.

questions.question: Free-range poultry system ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Murgiyon ko din bhar khule me gh घूमने aur charne ke liye chhod dena
options.B: Murgiyon ko cages me tight rakhna
options.D: Murgiyon ko band room me light dena

questions.explanation: Free range ya organic system me murgiyon ko farm ke khule area me natural grazing ke liye choda jata hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon ke room (poultry house) ki orientation (direction) kya honi chahiye India me?
questions.explanation: East-to-West direction rakhne se dhoop seedhe room ke andar nahi aati, jisse garmiyon me room thanda rehta hai.

questions.question: Poultry shed me cross-ventilation (hawa ka aana-jaana) kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Ammonia gas aur garmi ko nikalne ke liye
options.B: Murgiyon ko udne me help karne ke liye
options.C: Feathers ko dry karne ke liye
options.D: Anday ko thanda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Murgiyon ke gobar se ammonia gas nikalti hai, isliye fresh air circulation ammonia toxicity se bachane ke liye bohot zaroori hai.

questions.question: Poultry house ke roof ki width normal cases me kitne se zyada nahi honi chahiye natural ventilation ke liye?
questions.explanation: Shed ki width agar 30-35 feet se zyada hogi to center me proper cross-ventilation nahi ho payega.

questions.question: Murgiyon ko garmi lagne (Heat Stress) par unme kya behavior dikhta hai?

options.A: Panting (Muh khol kar tezi se saans lena)

questions.explanation: Murgiyon me sweat glands nahi hote, isliye wo garmi me panting (haaphna) shuru karti hain body heat release karne ke liye.

questions.question: Heavy body weight aur meat yield wali standard broiler breed kaun si hai?
questions.explanation: Cobb aur Ross pure world me broiler commercial hybrids ke sabse bade brands hain.

questions.question: Poultry house me litter material ko dry rakhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Coccidiosis aur ammonia gas build-up se bachne ke liye
options.C: Feathers color change karne ke liye
options.D: Cages ko safe rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Geela litter (wet litter) bimariyo (jaise coccidiosis) ke parasites aur bacteria ke grow hone ki ideal jagah hai.

questions.question: Litter ko dry rakhne ke liye usme kya milaya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Chuna (slaked lime) moisture ko absorb karta hai aur ammonia gas ko control karne me help karta hai.

questions.question: Poultry farm me 'Brooding' stage kya hoti hai?

options.B: Chuse (chicks) ko shuruat ke 2-3 hafte tak artificial garmi (temperature) dena

questions.explanation: Chote chuse khud apna body temperature control nahi kar paate, isliye heater/bulbs se unhe heat di jati hai jise brooding kehte hain.

questions.question: Brooding ke shuruati dino (day 1-7) me temperature kitna hona chahiye chicks ke liye?
questions.explanation: Day-old chicks ko lagbhag 95°F (35°C) temperature chahiye hota hai, jo har hafte 5°F kam kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Agar chicks brooder lamp ke bilkul paas aakar ek dusre ke upar chadh rahe hain, to iska kya matlab hai?

options.A: Unhe bohot garmi lag rahi hai
options.B: Unhe thand lag rahi hai (temperature kam hai)

questions.explanation: Agar chicks ek sath ikatthe ho rahe hain (huddling), to room temperature kam hai aur unhe thand lag rahi hai.

questions.question: Brooder house me chicks ko corner me dabkar marne se bachane ke liye kya lagaya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Chick guards metal ya cardboard ke round panels hote hain jo chicks ko corner me jam hone se rokte hain.

questions.question: Poultry farming me 'Cannibalism' kya hota hai?

options.A: Murgiyon ka aapas me ek dusre ko chonch maarna aur pankh/skin khana

questions.explanation: Overcrowding ya nutrition ki kami ke karan murgiyan ek dusre ko peck karti hain aur ghayal kar deti hain.

questions.question: Cannibalism ko rokne ke liye murgiyon me kaun sa operation kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Debeaking (chonch ka kuch hissa katna) cannibalism aur feed wastage ko rokne ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Broiler poultry feed ko kitne stages me divide kiya jata hai growth ke according?
questions.explanation: Broiler feed ke teen stages hote hain: Pre-starter (0-10 days), Starter (11-21 days) aur Finisher (22 days to market size).

questions.question: Layer chickens ke laying phase (anda dene ki umar) me feed me kis mineral ki quantity high honi chahiye?
questions.explanation: Eggshell calcium carbonate se bana hota hai, isliye anday dene wali murgiyon ko calcium rich diet chahiye hoti hai.

questions.question: Poultry feed ka sabse main ingredient (energy source) kya hai jo farm costs ka bada part hota hai?
questions.explanation: Maize poultry feed me carbohydrate/energy ka primary source hai, jo total feed mixture ka 50-60% tak hota hai.

questions.question: Poultry feed me Protein source ke liye primarily kya mix kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Soybean meal protein ka best vegetable source hai jo poultry feed formulations me common hai.

questions.question: Feed efficiency ko measure karne ke liye kis term ka use kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: FCR = Total Feed Consumed / Total Weight Gain. Jitna kam FCR hoga, farm profit utna zyada hoga.

questions.question: Ideal Broiler FCR lagbhag kitna hota hai modern management me?
questions.explanation: Lagbhag 1.5 kg feed khakar broiler 1 kg body weight gain kar leta hai, jo bohot efficient hai.

questions.question: Poultry ko pine ke pani ko sanitize karne ke liye kya milaya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Paani ke through infection na faile, isliye chlorine se drinking water treat kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon me feed digestibility badhane ke liye chote patthar ke tukde diye jate hain, unhe kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Murgiyon ke teeth nahi hote, grit gizzard (pachak thaili) me jakar daane ko peesne me help karta hai.

questions.question: Mycotoxins (fungal poison) se poultry feed ko bachane ke liye feed me kya add kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Feed me moisture ki wajah se fungus (jaise Aspergillus) toxins banate hain, toxin binders in toxins ko absorb karke nikal dete hain.

questions.question: Murgiyon me vitamin E ki kami se hone wali muscle/nerve weakness bimari ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Vitamin E aur Selenium ki kami se crazy chick disease hoti hai jisme chick sahi se chal nahi pata.

questions.question: Broiler feed me energy level aur fat absorption badhane ke liye thodi quantity me kya add kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Broiler finisher feeds me high energy ke liye 1-3% oil/fat add kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Poultry feeding me 'Chaff cutter' ka use hota hai kya?

options.A: Nahi, poultry ko bariki se pisa mash ya pellet feed diya jata hai
options.B: Haan, pashuon ki tarah chara katne ke liye
options.C: Sirf eggs clean karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Chaff cutter dairy me use hota hai, poultry me feeds tiny mash (powder) ya pellets (dane) form me hote hain.

questions.question: Broiler chicks ko feed khilane wale automatic ya manual bartan ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Daana khilane wale bartan ko Feeder aur paani pilane wale ko Drinker kehte hain.

questions.question: Automatic water system me modern farms me kya use hota hai jisse pani waste nahi hota?
questions.explanation: Nipple drinking system me chick jab nipple ko touch karta hai tabhi pani drop hota hai, jisse litter dry rehta hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon ke feed me aane wala main cost pure farm operational cost ka lagbhag kitna percent hota hai?
questions.explanation: Poultry farming me feed cost hi sabse bada investment hai jo total cost ka lagbhag 70% hota hai.

questions.question: Ande se chusa nikalne ke process ko artificial tarike se jis machine me kiya jata hai use kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Incubator machine temperature aur humidity control karke natural hatch ki tarah ande se chusa nikalti hai.

questions.question: Murga ke ande se chusa nikalne me kitne din (incubation period) lagte hain?
questions.explanation: Chicken eggs ka incubation period exactly 21 din (21 days) hota hai.

questions.question: Incubator machine me andon ko rotate (ghumana/turn) kyu kiya jata hai?

options.A: Embryo ko shell se chipakne se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Andon ko har 1-2 ghante me automatic turn kiya jata hai taaki embryo center me rahe aur shell se na chipke.

questions.question: Incubator me shuruati 18 dino ke liye ideal temperature kitna set kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Incubation me body temperature ke lagbhag barabar yaani 99.5°F (37.5°C) temperature zaroori hai.

questions.question: Hatching ke time incubator me Relative Humidity (nami) kitni honi chahiye last 3 days me?
questions.explanation: Aakhiri 3 dino me humidity badha di jati hai taaki ande ka chilka (shell) soft ho jaye aur chusa aasaani se use break kar sake.

questions.question: Ande ke andar embryo healthy hai ya nahi, ye check karne ke liye dark room me light daal kar dekhne ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Candling process me ande par light focus karke fertile/infertile andon aur crack shells ko detect kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Hatchery me candling kis kis din ki jati hai general practice me?
questions.explanation: 7th day par development dekhne ke liye aur 18th day par setter se hatcher me transfer karte waqt candling hoti hai.

questions.question: Hatchery me setter machine aur hatcher machine me kya difference hai?

options.A: Setter me pehle 18 din anday rehte hain, Hatcher me aakhiri 3 din chusa nikalne ke liye rakhe jate hain
options.B: Setter chusa paalta hai, Hatcher anda nikalta hai
options.C: Setter anday ko boil karta hai
options.D: Dono bilkul same hain bina kisi difference ke

questions.explanation: 18th day ke baad andon ko Setter tray se nikal kar Hatcher basket me shift kiya jata hai taaki chusa aasaani se ghum sake.

questions.question: Fertile egg aur Infertile egg me kya main difference hai?

options.A: Fertile egg se chusa nikal sakta hai (mating se paida), infertile se nahi (non-fertile)
options.B: Infertile egg me yolk nahi hota

questions.explanation: Commercial table eggs jo market me milte hain wo infertile hote hain aur unme chusa nahi ban sakta.

questions.question: Incubator me andon ko kaise arrange kiya jata hai?

options.A: Broad end up (chauda hissa upar) aur pointed end down (nukila hissa neeche)
options.B: Pointed end up aur broad end down

questions.explanation: Broad end me air cell (hawa ki thaili) hoti hai jisse embryo saans leta hai, isliye chauda hissa hamesha upar hona chahiye.

questions.question: Hatchery me clean air aur sanitation ke liye kaun si gas se fumigation kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Formalin aur KMnO4 chemical reaction se formaldehyde gas banti hai jo hatchery ke micro-organisms ko maar deti hai.

questions.question: Ande se nikalne ke baad chicks ka sex (male/female) identify karne ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Vent sexing ya wing feather length se male aur female chicks ko alag kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Incubator me air circulation (fan) ka kya function hai?

options.A: Temperature aur oxygen ko machine me barabar distribute rakhna

questions.explanation: Forced draft incubators me fans hot air aur oxygen ko sabhi trays tak barabar pahuchate hain.

questions.question: Hatchery waste (chhilke, mare chuse) ko disposal karne ka best method kya hai?

options.A: Incineration (Jalana) ya Deep burial (Gaddhe me dabana)

questions.explanation: Biosecurity ke liye hatchery waste ko jalana ya deep ground burial karna hi safe aur environment-friendly hai.

questions.question: Day-old chicks ko hatchery se transport karte waqt kis type ke boxes use hote hain?

options.B: Cardboard boxes specialized holes ke sath air supply ke liye

questions.explanation: Air holes wale disposable corrugated paper boxes me chicks ko safely door tak transport kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon me hone wali 'Ranikhet' (New Castle Disease) bimari kis wajah se hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Ranikhet (New Castle Disease) ek behad dangerous aur highly contagious viral disease hai jo tezi se failti hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon me Bird Flu (Avian Influenza) ka main cause kya hai?
questions.explanation: Bird Flu H5N1 virus se failta hai, jo zoonotic hai (insano me bhi pashuon se aa sakta hai).

questions.question: Gumboro disease ka dusra naam kya hai jo chicks ki immunity khatam karti hai?
questions.explanation: IBD (Infectious Bursal Disease) ko Gumboro bimari kehte hain, ye chicks ke immune organ 'Bursa' ko destroy karti hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon ki skin, comb aur wattles par papdi (nodules) banna kis bimari ki pehchan hai?
questions.explanation: Fowl Pox (poxvirus se) me skin par daane aur zakhm (lesions) ban jate hain.

questions.question: Coccidiosis bimari murgiyon me kis organ ko sabse zyada damage karti hai?

options.B: Intestine (Aant) jisse khooni dast hote hain

questions.explanation: Coccidiosis ek protozoan disease hai jo intestinal lining ko damage karti hai, jisse bloody diarrhea (khooni dast) hote hain.

questions.question: Coccidiosis se bachne ke liye feed me kya milaya jata hai regularly?
questions.explanation: Feed formulation me coccidiostats milaaye jate hain taaki coccidiosis disease na faile.

questions.question: Ranikhet disease se bachne ke liye chicks ko 5-7 din ki age me kaun si vaccine di jati hai?
questions.explanation: Ranikhet se bachav ke liye shuruat me mild live vaccine 'Lasota' aankh ya naak me drop ke roop me di jata hai.

questions.question: Murgiyon me paralysis (lakwa) aur neck twisting kis disease ki vajah se ho sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Marek's disease me nerves affect hoti hain jisse wing/leg paralysis ho jata hai aur Ranikhet me nervous symptoms dikhte hain.

questions.question: Marek's disease ki vaccine kab di jati hai chicks ko?
questions.explanation: Marek's ki vaccine hatchery me hi janam ke pehle din (Day 1) subcutaneous injection se lagayi jati hai.

questions.question: Poultry farm me 'Biosecurity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Infection aur pathogens ko farm ke andar aane se rokne ke hygienic methods

questions.explanation: Biosecurity me disinfection bath, clean clothes, boundary wall, bahar ke logo ki entry block karna, aur birds ka sanitization aata hai.

questions.question: Farm gate aur shed ke entrance par visitors ke liye kya banaya jata hai jisme disinfectant pani hota hai?
questions.explanation: Entrance par 'Foot Bath' (chuna aur potassium solution) hota hai jisme shoes saaf karke hi andar ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Murgiyon me fungal infection ki wajah se respiratory problem hone ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Aspergillus fungus geeli ghans/litter me grow karta hai aur saans ke raste chuso ko affect karta hai, jise Brooder Pneumonia kehte hain.

questions.question: Infectious Coryza kis type ki bimari hai jisme murgiyon ke face par sujan (swelling) aur nose discharge hota hai?
questions.explanation: Infectious Coryza ek acute respiratory bacterial disease hai jisme aankh ke pass extreme swelling hoti hai.

questions.question: Poultry farm me rats (chuhe) aur wild birds ko aane se rokna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Wo feed khate hain aur diseases (jaise Salmonella) failate hain

questions.explanation: Chuhe aur jungli chidiya farm ke feed ko contaminate karte hain aur dangerous pathogens carry karte hain.

questions.question: Poultry house ko nayi batch aane se pehle clean karne ke liye kis gas se fumigate kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Fumigation se poora shed sanitize ho jata hai aur puraani batch ka koi micro-organism bacha nahi rehta.

questions.question: Healthy and fertile breeding flock me Male to Female ratio (murgon aur murgiyon ka ratio) kya hona chahiye normal design me?

options.D: Dono ka ratio zaroori nahi hai

questions.explanation: Proper egg fertilization ke liye breeder farm me 10 murgiyon par 1 murga (rooster) hona chahiye.

questions.question: All-in All-out system ka poultry farming me kya benefit hai?

options.A: Pure batch ko ek sath lana aur ek sath bechna, jisse disease cycle toot jata hai

questions.explanation: Ek sath birds ko bechne ke baad poore shed ko khali karke disinfect kiya jata hai aur gap diya jata hai, jisse infection ka risk lagbhag khatam ho jata hai.

questions.question: Sick (bimari) birds ko healthy flock se alag karne ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Bimar pashuon/birds ko turant alag (isolate) kar dena chahiye aur productivity na dene wale birds ko cull (remove) karna chahiye.

questions.question: Murgiyon me calcium aur vitamin D3 ki kami se unke pair kamzor hokar chalne me problem hone ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Calcium, phosphorus ya Vitamin D3 ki kami se bones soft ho jati hain jise rickets kehte hain.

questions.question: Murgiyon ke par (feathers) par aane wale ticks aur mites se bachne ke liye kya kiya jata hai?

options.A: Shed disinfection aur anti-parasitic dusting / spray

questions.explanation: Body parasites ko control karne ke liye safe antiparasitic chemical dust ya spray use hota hai.

questions.question: Fresh and high-quality egg check karne ke liye 'Egg Grading' kis cheez par base hoti hai?

options.A: Egg weight, cleanliness, shell quality aur internal quality (yolk & albumen)

questions.explanation: Egg grading ande ke size, saaf-safai aur yolk ki condition par nirbhar karti hai.

questions.question: Egg yolk (ande ke beech ka peela hissa) ka yellow/orange color kis pigment ki presence se hota hai?
questions.explanation: Murgiyan jo yellow maize ya green grass khati hain unke yolk me xanthophyll accumulate hota hai jo use deep yellow color deta hai.

questions.question: Egg albumen (ande ka safed hissa) me primarily kya paya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Egg white (albumen) me lagbhag 90% pani aur baqi high-quality protein hota hai, isme fat zero hota hai.

questions.question: Table egg (commercial egg) aur Hatching egg me kya main difference hai?

options.A: Table egg infertile hota hai aur hatching egg fertile hota hai
options.C: Hatching egg ko boil nahi kiya ja sakta

questions.explanation: Hatching egg breeder farm se aata hai jaha male and female sath rehte hain, jabki layer farm par male nahi hote isliye table egg infertile hote hain.

questions.question: Egg shells par aane wale cracks aur structural defects ko examine karne ka automatic machine method kya hai?
questions.explanation: Modern sorting machines ultrasonic waves aur light beams se micro-cracks detect karti hain.

questions.question: Ande ki shell (outer layer) ka main chemical component kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Ande ka chilka lagbhag 95% Calcium Carbonate se bana hota hai.

questions.question: Broiler meat ko processing plant me clean karne ke baad moisture level maintain karne ke liye thande pani me dubane ko kya kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Carcass chilling (water chilling ya air chilling) bacteria grow hone se rokti hai aur freshness maintain karti hai.

questions.question: Egg yolk me sabse bada nutritional component kya hota hai?

options.A: Fat, Cholesterol, Fat-soluble Vitamins (A, D, E, K) and Lecithin

questions.explanation: Ande ka poora fat aur cholesterol yolk me hi hota hai, iske alawa iron aur vitamins bhi isme hote hain.

questions.question: Ande ki shelf life ko cold storage (fridge) me kitne temperature par badhaya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Cold storage me 4-10°C par anday 3-4 week tak fresh rehte hain bina quality lose kiye.

questions.question: Murgiyon ke anday ko farm se direct retail market me sell karne wale cooperative and commercial marketing board ka name kya hai India me?
questions.explanation: NECC India me egg prices declare karta hai aur egg consumption ko promote karta hai ('Sunday ho ya Monday, roz khao ande').

questions.question: Broiler poultry farming me market age (selling stage) kitne weeks ki hoti hai general standards me?

options.A: 5 to 6 weeks (35-42 days) jab weight 2-2.5 kg ho jaye

questions.explanation: Modern broilers high efficiency ke karan sirf 5-6 weeks me market-ready weight (2+ kg) reach kar lete hain.

questions.question: Layers (egg layers) anday dena kis age me shuru karti hain?

options.A: 18 to 20 weeks (lagbhag 4.5 se 5 mahine ki umar me)

questions.explanation: Layers 18-20 weeks ki umar me sexual maturity reach karti hain aur anday dena shuru karti hain jo lagbhag 72-80 weeks tak chalta hai.

questions.question: Layer farming me peak egg production phase (sabse zyada anda dene wala period) kis week me hota hai?
questions.explanation: 26-30 weeks par flock peak production (90%+ laying rate) reach karta hai.

questions.question: Ande ke andar ande ki quality ko bina use tode light se check karne me kis parameter ko dekha jata hai?

options.A: Air cell size, yolk shadow, blood spots

questions.explanation: Candling se ande ke andar ka air cell size (jitna chota air cell, utna fresh egg) aur blood spots detect kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Poultry processing plants me hygiene aur safety standards ko maintain karne ke liye kaun sa certification zaroori hai?

options.A: FSSAI registration & HACCP (Hazard Analysis Critical Control Point) norms

questions.explanation: Commercial chicken meat processing aur export ke liye FSSAI approval aur HACCP hygiene guidelines ka palan mandatory hai.
